user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 5 > Email Catch-up Block

node_data.name: Email Catch-up Block
node_data.description: Dedicated time_block to respond to accumulated work emails. Optional but recommended to stay on top of inbox.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node represents a work commitment ('Email Catch-up Block') on Day 5, which helps identify that Day 5 is NOT a free day.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 5 > Client Check-in Call

node_data.name: Client Check-in Call
node_data.description: Remote video call with client to discuss project status. Light work commitment from hotel room.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node represents a work commitment ('Client Check-in Call') on Day 5, confirming Day 5 has work obligations.

selected_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node_data.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node_data.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node shows a leisure activity (Art Gallery) on Day 3, which is relevant for determining if Day 3 is free of work/flights.

node_data.name: YYZ Departure
node_data.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node represents a flight ('YYZ Departure') on Day 10, which helps identify that Day 10 is NOT a free day.

node_data.name: Full-Day Workshop
node_data.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

selected_nodes.reasoning: This node represents a major work commitment ('Full-Day Workshop') on Day 4, confirming Day 4 is NOT a free day.
